Command.Name: Original File
Command.Title: Getting an original (unmodified) GTA V file.
Command.Description:
If you need an **original GTA V file** (for example `visualsettings.dat` or `update.rpf`), you **already have it**.
The `mods` folder is just a **copy of your real game files** used for safe modding. The **original files are still in the same location outside the `mods` folder**.

Field.Name: How to find the original file
Field.Value:
1. Open your **GTAV installation folder**. 2. Navigate to the **same path** as the file inside `mods`. 3. Copy the file **from outside the `mods` folder**. 4. Paste it into the **same location inside `mods`**.
Example: `GTAV\update\update.rpf` → original `GTAV\mods\update\update.rpf` → modded copy
